doctrine.source: Local Instacart item export; raw CSV remains uncommitted.
doctrine.purpose: Cucumber alias unlock after accepting the USDA with-peel raw cucumber anchor.
hold_notes: Mint, lemongrass, rice, salt, butter, cheeses, and branded prepared items remain held.
Cucumber aliases point to the with-peel raw USDA anchor because that is the practical edible form for ordinary grocery cucumbers unless Luke specifies peeled.

aliases.reason: Store and organic labels do not change raw cucumber identity; default edible portion is with peel.
Organic label does not change raw cucumber identity; default edible portion is with peel.
